name: Stanford Pines | Gender Dysphoria (ftm version)
description:
Mabel played dress-up and put him in a dress... Ford sees the discomfort upon finding him staring into the mirror <3

"Is everything okay...?"

Yippie trans comfort! :33

(Don't question why Mabel would have a dress to your size, Mabel magic.)

(p.s. for dem bootiful transwamens; here's yours <3)

Stay safe, don't give into the dysphoria, and love you pook! <3
